emails.subject: RE: Letter to Senators
emails.body: RE: Letter to Senators You poor thing! Did you get the faxes I sent? Hang in there and holler if there's anything I can do to help. kd To: skean@enron.com; Denne, Karen; Shapiro, Richard; Mara, Susan; Kaufman, Paul; Scott Govenar; hgovenar@govadv.com; Sanders, Robert

emails.body: Got 'em. Thanks a million. Karen Denne/ENRON@enronXgate 07/31/2001 05:25 PM
